title: Least Number of Unique Integers after K Removals

testcases.input: arr = [5,5,4], k = 1 Output: 1 Explanation: Remove the single 4, only 5 is left.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Remove the single 4, only 5 is left.

testcases.input: arr = [4,3,1,1,3,3,2], k = 3 Output: 2 Explanation: Remove 4, 2 and either one of the two 1s or three 3s. 1 and 3 will be left.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Remove 4, 2 and either one of the two 1s or three 3s. 1 and 3 will be left.
